name: error_messages_v1
description: Training examples for aosctl error messages and recovery suggestions. Covers invalid arguments, resource not found, permission denied, state conflicts, and recovery guidance. All examples grounded in AosError enum variants and real CLI command structure.

schema.input: User-visible error message or scenario description
schema.target: Correct error text and/or recovery suggestion as aosctl would produce it

metadata.label: positive
metadata.subcategory: one of: invalid_arguments, resource_not_found, permission_denied, state_conflicts, recovery_suggestions
